title: Armor HUD
description: Armor HUD (or Armour HUD) adds armor durability display to your screen with HUD Lib.
body:
# Armor HUD

Armor HUD adds an Armor HUD element to [HUD Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/hud-lib), it has options to change the color, background color, and whether or not you want the color to be based on durability (>80% dark green, >50% green, >20% yellow, otherwise red). To open configuration press `RIGHT SHIFT`. 

## Screenshot

Here is Armour HUD with the default configuration, the position, and colors can be changed.
![Armor HUD with default configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wAk5JZkv/images/98fff26d0d67ccc2be44006dd909e79b82bfa8d1.png)
